channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What to know about US-Iran standoff over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Trump accuses Iran of violating the ceasefire as he announces plans to send US negotiators to Pakistan for more talks.

item.title: Trump says US negotiators to head to Pakistan for Iran talks
item.description: US president announces talks in Islamabad and accuses Iran of violating ceasefire, warning Tehran of repercussions.

item.title: Iran war: 10 frequently used words and their meanings
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran nears two months. We break down some of the frequently used terminology in this war.

item.title: Iran warns Hormuz will stay shut unless US lifts siege on its ports
item.description: Tehran is threatening to keep the Strait of Hormuz shut unless Washington lifts the ‘US siege’ on Iranian ports.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 51 of the US-Israeli conflict?
item.description: Tehran says it will keep the strategic Strait of Hormuz closed until Washington ends its blockade of Iranian ports.

item.title: How the Israeli military targets the people who save lives
item.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 57 medical workers in Lebanon since early March. It is a pattern lifted from Gaza.

item.title: Iran, US still ‘far’ from breakthrough amid Strait of Hormuz impasse
item.description: Tehran is 'fully prepared' for the US to resume hostilities at any moment, says Iran's parliament speaker Ghalibaf.

item.title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
item.description: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.

item.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
item.description: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

item.title: French peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon
item.description: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.
